Demonstrates a Pebble app for dictation with session management, user interaction, and build configuration.

## Folders
- **[src](src/README.md)**: Demonstrates a Pebble app for dictation with session management and user interaction handling.

## Files
- **[.gitignore](.gitignore.md)**: Specifies files to ignore in version control, specifically build-generated files.
- **[appinfo.json](appinfo.json.md)**: Metadata for the Dictation demo app, including UUID, version, and target platforms.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build rules for compiling a Pebble project with optional worker support and platform-specific binaries.
